import re


def validate_forms(forms: list[dict]) -> list[dict]:
    errors = []
    for form in forms:
        email = form.get("email", "")
        if not re.compile(r"^[^@]+@[^@]+\.[^@]+$").match(email):
            errors.append({"field": "email", "error": "invalid"})
        phone = form.get("phone", "")
        if not re.compile(r"^\+?1?\d{9,15}$").match(phone):
            errors.append({"field": "phone", "error": "invalid"})
    return errors


def extract_metadata(text: str) -> dict:
    date_match = re.compile(r"\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}").search(text)
    time_match = re.compile(r"\d{2}:\d{2}:\d{2}").search(text)
    return {
        "date": date_match.group() if date_match else None,
        "time": time_match.group() if time_match else None,
    }
